prompt: Implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt using Lua. The executable must be named 'minigit' and be runnable as ./minigit. For compiled languages, include a Makefile or build script. For interpreted languages, ensure the minigit file has a proper shebang line and is executable. Verify your implementation passes all tests by running: bash test-v1.sh
response:
```lua
#!/usr/bin/env lua

local function die(msg)
    io.stderr:write("minigit: " .. msg .. "\n")
    os.exit(1)
end

local function usage()
    io.stderr:write("Usage: minigit <command> [<args>...]\n")
    os.exit(1)
end

local function cmd_init()
    local ok, err = os.rename(".minigit", ".minigit")
    if ok then
        die("already initialized")
    end
    local ok2, err2, code = os.rename(".minigit", ".minigit")
    if code == 2 then
        os.execute("mkdir .minigit")
        print("Initialized empty minigit repository")
    else
        die("unable to create .minigit: " .. (err2 or ""))
    end
end

local function cmd_add(filename)
    if not filename then
        die("add requires filename")
    end
    local f = io.open(filename, "r")
    if not f then
        die("file not found: " .. filename)
    end
    f:close()
    local index = io.open(".minigit/index", "a")
    if not index then
        die("not initialized")
    end
    index:write(filename .. "\n")
    index:close()
end

local function cmd_commit(message)
    if not message then
        die("commit requires message")
    end
    local index = io.open(".minigit/index", "r")
    if not index then
        die("nothing to commit")
    end
    local files = {}
    for line in index:lines() do
        table.insert(files, line)
    end
    index:close()
    if #files == 0 then
        die("nothing to commit")
    end
    local head = io.open(".minigit/HEAD", "r")
    local commit_num = 0
    if head then
        commit_num = tonumber(head:read("*a")) or 0
        head:close()
    end
    commit_num = commit_num + 1
    local commit_file = string.format(".minigit/commit%04d", commit_num)
    local out = io.open(commit_file, "w")
    out:write(message .. "\n")
    for _, f in ipairs(files) do
        local fh = io.open(f, "r")
        if fh then
            local content = fh:read("*a")
            fh:close()
            out:write(f .. "\t" .. content .. "\n")
        end
    end
    out:close()
    head = io.open(".minigit/HEAD", "w")
    head:write(tostring(commit_num))
    head:close()
    os.remove(".minigit/index")
    print(string.format("Committed commit%04d", commit_num))
end

local function cmd_log()
    local head = io.open(".minigit/HEAD", "r")
    if not head then
        die("no commits")
    end
    local commit_num = tonumber(head:read("*a")) or 0
    head:close()
    if commit_num == 0 then
        die("no commits")
    end
    for i = commit_num, 1, -1 do
        local fname = string.format(".minigit/commit%04d", i)
        local f = io.open(fname, "r")
        if f then
            local msg = f:read("*l")
            print(string.format("commit%04d %s", i, msg))
            f:close()
        end
    end
end

local function cmd_create_branch(branch)
    if not branch then
        die("create-branch requires name")
    end
    local head = io.open(".minigit/HEAD", "r")
    if not head then
        die("no commits")
    end
    local commit_num = tonumber(head:read("*a")) or 0
    head:close()
    if commit_num == 0 then
        die("no commits")
    end
    local branch_file = ".minigit/branch_" .. branch
    local b = io.open(branch_file, "r")
    if b then
        b:close()
        die("branch exists")
    end
    b = io.open(branch_file, "w")
    b:write(tostring(commit_num))
    b:close()
    print("Created branch " .. branch)
end

local function cmd_list_branches()
    local p = io.popen("ls .minigit/branch_* 2>/dev/null")
    if not p then
        return
    end
    local head = io.open(".minigit/HEAD", "r")
    local current = 0
    if head then
        current = tonumber(head:read("*a")) or 0
        head:close()
    end
    for fname in p:lines() do
        local branch = fname:match("branch_(.+)$")
        local bf = io.open(fname, "r")
        local commit = 0
        if bf then
            commit = tonumber(bf:read("*a")) or 0
            bf:close()
        end
        local marker = (commit == current) and "* " or "  "
        print(marker .. branch)
    end
    p:close()
end

local function cmd_checkout_branch(branch)
    if not branch then
        die("checkout-branch requires name")
    end
    local branch_file = ".minigit/branch_" .. branch
    local b = io.open(branch_file, "r")
    if not b then
        die("no such branch")
    end
    local commit_num = tonumber(b:read("*a")) or 0
    b:close()
    local head = io.open(".minigit/HEAD", "w")
    head:write(tostring(commit_num))
    head:close()
    print("Switched to branch " .. branch)
end

local function cmd_merge(branch)
    if not branch then
        die("merge requires branch name")
    end
    local branch_file = ".minigit/branch_" .. branch
    local b = io.open(branch_file, "r")
    if not b then
        die("no such branch")
    end
    local merge_commit = tonumber(b:read("*a")) or 0
    b:close()
    local head = io.open(".minigit/HEAD", "r")
    local current = 0
    if head then
        current = tonumber(head:read("*a")) or 0
        head:close()
    end
    if merge_commit == current then
        die("already up to date")
    end
    local fname = string.format(".minigit/commit%04d", merge_commit)
    local f = io.open(fname, "r")
    if not f then
        die("commit not found")
    end
    local msg = f:read("*l")
    f:close()
    local head_w = io.open(".minigit/HEAD", "w")
    head_w:write(tostring(merge_commit))
    head_w:close()
    print(string.format("Merged commit%04d %s", merge_commit, msg))
end

local args = {...}
if #args < 1 then
    usage()
end

local cmd = args[1]
if cmd == "init" then
    cmd_init()
elseif cmd == "add" then
    cmd_add(args[2])
elseif cmd == "commit" then
    cmd_commit(args[2])
elseif cmd == "log" then
    cmd_log()
elseif cmd == "create-branch" then
    cmd_create_branch(args[2])
elseif cmd == "list-branches" then
    cmd_list_branches()
elseif cmd == "checkout-branch" then
    cmd_checkout_branch(args[2])
elseif cmd == "merge" then
    cmd_merge(args[2])
else
    usage()
end
```
